style_effects: Intense crimson and gold embers drift upward in slow, lazy spirals around Hitmonlee's limbs, crackling with a molten lava glow that illuminates the air with flickering orange light. A dynamic, jagged aura of searing orange energy pulses rhythmically around its body, casting sharp, dancing shadows on the ground beneath it. The atmosphere is charged with heat shimmer, distorting the background into a hazy, golden haze, while smoke trails curl from its feet with each movement. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
